sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110500" key="fellagwgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φελλᾰγωγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, perh. due to a confusion with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φαλλ-,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (expld. as a Roman festival).</entryFree>
